description: Gold benchmark for the IndustryIQ retriever, scored against the real chunks in the live Postgres store. Each query lists the industry it targets and the substring(s) that mark a relevant chunk (gold_needles); the runner resolves those to the gold chunk ids and scores whether retrieval surfaced them. Queries per category track each category's share of chunks in the store, with a floor of 5 for the smaller categories so they stay meaningfully covered: AI 20, Finance 15, Healthcare 5, Agriculture 5, Semiconductor 5 (22,156 chunks total, 50 queries).

queries.query: How much did U.S. private AI investment reach in 2025?
gold_needles: U.S. private AI investment reached $285.9 billion in 2025

gold_needles: Documented AI incidents rose to 362, up from 233 in 2024
